item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Neil the Seal
item.description: Neil (born October 2020), also known as Neil the Seal, is a southern elephant seal in the Australian state of Tasmania. He was born in Salem Bay, Tasmania. Neil gained fame in July 2022 after resting in Hobart for his month-long moulting period. While most people kept a safe distance, incidents of humans disturbing the seal led to traffic cones placed to protect him. Neil, playing with the traffic cones, attracted more attention to his unusual behavior. Later events saw Neil more closely interacting with humans, often leaving the beach and resting on the city's roads, or even following people. In one instance in 2023, Neil was found basking in someone's front lawn for a few hours, while another instance downing a fence in Dunalley. He was relocated in April 2023 after people and dogs harassed him in Kingston Beach. Neil is an internet celebrity, having at least 126,000 followers on Instagram under the username "neiltheseal22" as of January 20, 2024, and over 730,000 followers on TikTok as of January 3, 2024. He is being monitored by the Marine Conservation Program, established by Tasmania's Department of Natural Resources and Environment, for health and safety reasons. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neil_(seal)
item.dc:creator: l0calh0st

item.title: Images of Note: Right now!
item.description:
Who gets up before 6am to get some shoes
I wish this was a joke.
ANSWER THE QUESTION!
p u n t
This is bringing me images of joy.
Baaa!
*plap plap plap plap plap plap plap plap* two rollerballs please.
f o r b i d d e n o h i o.
Can we just fucking talk about that for a second?
fuck you, hyperfixate on salamanca
TEACH. YOUR KIDS. INTERNET SAFETY.
behold, the gayest thing you have seen today.
Gouge your eyes of pussies.
We're calling out Shane fans here.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Memes about me! Or things I identify with.
item.description:
Pebbles. I pebble.
It’s almost Halloween.?!!
It’s so frustrating when they don’t.
Every night. Usually with the fan on high and the heated blanket on low.
I live in Maryland ?
I mean, they haven’t SAID this to me, but I have to assume they are thinking it, right?
It’s over 9,000
I am. Trust me.
#sucker
It’s too bad I can’t put this on Tinder for all those thirsty ladies who say, “be honest…tell me about yourself.”
I’d post more but Imgur seems to make me wait about 4-6 hours between posts.
I love pie. ?
Or my acquaintance.
Actually between 22:00 and 00:30, because I’m old and need to sleep earlier.
Someone sent this to me once after a meme dump and now I try to end all my “About Me” meme dumps.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Well I know what I’m doing for the foreseeable future
item.description: Foster kitten Jasmine just had a big surgery this morning to remove her left eye. When she got home she had way more energy than I thought she would. She ate a bunch of food, explored the newly-cleaned kitten room, and said hi to my cats Madison and Scooty Booty. But then…the CRASH. She is fully passed out. Good thing I have everything I need to sit still for a few hours. We’ll get her cleaned up later. For now - sleep, my little pirate baby (She literally can’t even be bothered by the big cats walking around haha https://imgur.com/gallery/zwvUmev )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Jasmine wishes you all a good night
item.description: Foster kitten Jasmine has had a big day, and is ending it in her favorite way - by laying on my neck. Who needs to be able to breathe in the middle of the night? Not me
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Some things are better left unsaid
item.description: Sure, this is probably normal. I think he felt comfortable sharing, but well, what about me. I didn't want to hear that. *Edit* Thank you all for the support and feedback. I think for the most part, desire is common and stronger in some people than others. The statement was 'in addition' to me, but he also desires other woman. I think he would have been bother if I said something similar. Everyone is correct, we need to talk about it, and thanks for the encouragement to do so.
item.dc:creator: gingersomethingimnotgoodatthis
